title: Showcase: Côté Électricité — quote-builder for residential rewires (composite)
problem: Composite case: a Quebec residential electrician quotes 6-8 jobs a week, mostly panel upgrades and rewires. Each quote is a 30-minute exercise of looking up wire prices, breaker counts, and labour estimates from a paper notebook. He wants the same numeric inputs he already collects (panel size, # circuits, run length) to spit out a presentable quote PDF in two minutes.
analysis: Second backfill composite. Smaller-scope than Tremblay — half-day Tier 1 work, ships in two days, costs around 300 $. Anchors the lower end of the price ladder so the wall isn't all Tier 2.

decisions.decision: Tier 1 — single Google Apps Script + a typeform, no app
decisions.rationale: He doesn't need an app. He needs a form on his phone that emails him a PDF. Apps Script ships in half a day, costs nothing to operate.

decisions.decision: Quebec sales-tax math built in (TPS 5% / TVQ 9.975%)
decisions.rationale: Out-of-the-box quoting tools default to US sales tax. Embedding the QC tax math in the template is the smallest deliverable detail with the largest credibility payoff.

successCriteria: Quote-creation time per job under 3 minutes (down from ~30). PDF presentable enough to send unchanged.
knownLimitations: Apps Script quota: 100 quotes/day cap on free tier — well above his volume.
No CRM, no follow-up automation. Conscious scope cut for the half-day price.
userGuide: Composite case — no live URL. The showcase wall card links to this feature.json's revision log.

annotations.author: marc+claude
annotations.body: [exemple composite] Tier 1 quote-builder showcase, surfaced on the homepage wall and at /showcase/<slug>.

title.fr: Côté Électricité — soumission en 2 min depuis le téléphone
title.en: Côté Electric — 2-minute quote-builder on the phone

summary.fr: Électricien résidentiel qui passait 30 min par soumission. Formulaire Apps Script + PDF présentable, taxes TPS/TVQ incluses. 30 min → 2 min.
summary.en: Residential electrician spending 30 min per quote. Apps Script form + presentable PDF, GST/QST embedded. 30 min → 2 min.

compositeDisclosure.fr: [exemple composite] Cas inspiré de plusieurs gens de métier; les chiffres reflètent un vrai engagement Tier 1.
compositeDisclosure.en: [composite example] Case inspired by several tradespeople; numbers reflect a real Tier 1 engagement.
